session.notes: First real Seedance 2.0 test. UGC hype-fan sneaker unboxing, PAID SOCIAL shoes. 0.9 credits matches ~0.06/sec image-to-video rate.

A/B vs asset 290dc89f — same sneaker UGC concept, now with voice-clone referenceAudio. Audio ref did NOT change price (still 0.9 for 15s image-to-video). Generated successfully in ~3 min. Audio reference did not change cost (0.9 same as non-audio-ref baseline). Need to listen to audio to confirm voice match.

Test #3: voice-clone w/ dialogue transcribed verbatim from reference audio via whisper. Testing whether generated speech faithfully matches BOTH the user's voice AND the exact words from their recording. Transcript: 'Holy shit guys this is so crazy I don't this is my voice like I'm the one talking here holding this product wow okay I don't really know what else to say'

response.error: Content checker rejected prompt (body.prompt: The content could not be processed because it contained material flagged by a content checker)

session.notes: Test #4a: pure v2v, referenceVideos only. CONFIRMS v2v pricing ~0.1 credits/sec (1.5 @ 15s). Ref video: valentina-hat-video-4-driving.mp4 | FAILED post-creation due to content check. CREDITS STILL CHARGED (1.5) despite failure — content check runs AFTER billing. Same base script worked in tests #1/#2/#3; the v2v-specific prompt additions or the reference video itself triggered the filter.

Test #4b: v2v+i2v combo FAILED. Combining referenceVideos + referenceImages on Seedance 2.0 returns HTTP 500 UNKNOWN_ERROR. Retried once, same result. Constraint: the two input modes appear to be mutually exclusive. NOT charged (create failed).

response.error: Content checker rejected body.prompt (same error as 4a despite sanitized prompt + different ref video + silent mode)

session.notes: Test #5: v2v retry after 4a content-check failure. Removed 3 variables: (1) sanitized prompt (no hype language / dialogue), (2) different ref video (astrid-veo31-720p-motion), (3) silent audioEnabled=false. Create returned 'pending' (not immediate fail like 4a), so content checker passed. Tests whether v2v itself works when content filter cooperates. | FAILED with identical content-check error. Charged 1.5 credits. STRONG signal: content filter is reading the reference video's visual content and reporting as body.prompt, OR v2v has a systemic issue in the external API.
